name: Annil Co.,Ltd
summary: Annil Co.,Ltd engages in the mid-to-high-end casual children's wear business under the Annil Annai brand in China. It focuses on clothing products for boys and girls of 0-12 years; 1-3 years child products; and 0-1 year baby boy products. The company also provides home services for 0-12 year children products. It serves customers through stores, as well as online stores comprising Tmall, Vipshop, and Micro mall. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
